question: How many battles did not lose any ship with tonnage '225'?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM battle WHERE id NOT IN ( SELECT lost_in_battle FROM ship WHERE tonnage  =  '225' );
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM battle WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_1 FROM ship WHERE col_5 = '225')
raw_response: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM battle WHERE col_1 NOT IN (SELECT col_1 FROM ship WHERE col_5 = '225')
